title: hydrocotyle elongata
intro: Hydrocotyle elongata, also known as Indian pennywort or Thumber's water pennywort, is a tropical plant species native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its long, trailing stems and small, round leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and neuroprotective effects. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle elongata include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine preparations.
